episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 391: Secret Lair Fall Superdrop
episode.description: James & Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and share thoughts on the Secret Lair Fall Superdrop in Ep 391 of MFF.
